languages.text: "Да, действительно запамятовал". {n}Изимонд пожимает плечами.{/n} "Вы правы, под эгидой служителей {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} был возведен родовой космопорт Гапраков на Веабосе-6". {n}Здоровый глаз капитана слегка сощуривается.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Да, действительно запамятовал". {n}Изимонд пожимает плечами.{/n} "Вы правы, под эгидой служителей {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} был возведен родовой космопорт Гапраков на Веабосе-6". {n}Здоровый глаз капитана слегка сощуривается.{/n}

languages.text: "Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Да, действительно запамятовал". {n}Изимонд пожимает плечами.{/n} "Вы правы, под эгидой служителей {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} был возведен родовой космопорт Гапраков на Веабосе-6". {n}Здоровый глаз капитана слегка сощуривается.{/n}

"Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the Omnissiah." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}

"Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the Omnissiah." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}

languages.text: «Sí, me habré confundido». {n}Sauerback se encoge de hombros.{/n} «Tiene razón, el espaciopuerto ancestral de los Gaprak en Vheabos VI se erigió bajo la protección de los sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}». {n}El ojo bueno del capitán se entrecierra levemente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sí, me habré confundido». {n}Sauerback se encoge de hombros.{/n} «Tiene razón, el espaciopuerto ancestral de los Gaprak en Vheabos VI se erigió bajo la protección de los sirvientes del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}». {n}El ojo bueno del capitán se entrecierra levemente.{/n}

languages.text: “是，我大概是记错了。”{n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克耸耸肩。{/n}“你说得对，贾帕克家族在维博斯六号星上的祖传星港，正是在{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}仆人们的庇护下建立的。”{n}上尉完好的那只眼睛微微眯起。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “是，我大概是记错了。”{n}伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克耸耸肩。{/n}“你说得对，贾帕克家族在维博斯六号星上的祖传星港，正是在{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}仆人们的庇护下建立的。”{n}上尉完好的那只眼睛微微眯起。{/n}

languages.text: « Il faut croire que ma mémoire me joue des tours, {n}rétorque Sauerback avec un haussement d'épaules.{/n} Vous avez raison, le spatioport ancestral des Gaprak sur Vhéabos-VI a été bâti sous l'égide des serviteurs de {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}l'Omnimessie{/g}. » {n}L'œil sain du capitaine s'étrécit imperceptiblement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Il faut croire que ma mémoire me joue des tours, {n}rétorque Sauerback avec un haussement d'épaules.{/n} Vous avez raison, le spatioport ancestral des Gaprak sur Vhéabos-VI a été bâti sous l'égide des serviteurs de {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}l'Omnimessie{/g}. » {n}L'œil sain du capitaine s'étrécit imperceptiblement.{/n}

languages.text: "Evet, yanlış hatırlamış olmalıyım." {n}Sauerback omuz silkiyor.{/n} "Haklısınız. Vheabos VI'daki Gaprakların ata yadigârı uzay limanı, {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} hizmetkârlarının himayesinde inşa edildi." {n}Yüzbaşının sağlam gözü hafifçe kısılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Evet, yanlış hatırlamış olmalıyım." {n}Sauerback omuz silkiyor.{/n} "Haklısınız. Vheabos VI'daki Gaprakların ata yadigârı uzay limanı, {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'in{/g} hizmetkârlarının himayesinde inşa edildi." {n}Yüzbaşının sağlam gözü hafifçe kısılıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ja, ich muss mich falsch erinnert haben." {n}Sauerback zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "Ihr habt recht, der Raumhafen der Gapraks auf Vheabos VI wurde unter der Schirmherrschaft der Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} errichtet." {n}Der Captain kneift sein gesundes Auge zusammen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ja, ich muss mich falsch erinnert haben. {n}Sauerback zuckt mit den Schultern.{/n} "Ihr habt recht, der Raumhafen der Gapraks auf Vheabos VI wurde unter der Schirmherrschaft der Diener des {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} errichtet." {n}Der Captain kneift sein gesundes Auge zusammen.{/n}

languages.text: 「そうだな、俺、間違えて覚えてたんだろうな。」{n}サウアーバックは肩をすくめた。{/n}「君が言う通り、ギャプラク家の祖先が作った宇宙港は、{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}オムニシア{/g}のしもべの庇護の下で建設されたんだ。」{n}艦長の健全な目はわずかに細くなった。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Yes, I must have misremembered." {n}Sauerback shrugs.{/n} "You're right, the Gapraks' ancestral spaceport on Vheabos VI was erected under the aegis of the servants of the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}." {n}The captain's healthy eye narrows slightly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「そうだな、俺、間違えて覚えてたんだろうな。」{n}サウアーバックは肩をすくめた。{/n}「君が言う通り、ギャプラク家の祖先が作った宇宙港は、{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}オムニシア{/g}のしもべの庇護の下で建設されたんだ。」{n}艦長の健全な目はわずかに細くなった。{/n}
